title: 大阪杯の後に・整わない呼吸

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket runs as fast as she can and
manages to barely win against Narita Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But it's not their heated rivalry that has left an
impression on the spectators—all the fans can
talk about is Taishin's explosive sprinting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket becomes motivated to work even
harder, so as not to lose to Narita Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever enthusiastic, she sets her sights on the
Takarazuka Kinen, the race to conclude the first
half of the Twinkle Series.
